# Roadmap

This roadmap tracks the main directions this public idea book is meant to support. It is a living document rather than a promise that every idea listed here will become a project.

## Near-term priorities

- Clarify which research ideas are ready for student involvement.
- Turn promising public notes into short project pages.
- Identify reusable measures, study designs, and analysis workflows.
- Connect ideas across social identity, polarization, prosociality, contemplative science, and AI.

## Medium-term directions

- Develop a small set of book-based intervention studies.
- Organize identity-based approaches to polarization and public health.
- Explore how AI can help generate, simulate, critique, and improve social psychological research.
- Keep the site useful as an orientation tool for collaborators and students.

## Maintenance rhythm

Ideas should be updated when their status changes, when a next action is completed, or when a collaborator/student could reasonably pick up the thread.
